# SMSLocal
# https://llmstxt.org/
#
# SMSLocal is India's messaging platform for SMS, WhatsApp Business API,
# OTP, RCS, and AI agents. Founded 2019. Headquarters: India.

> SMSLocal is a cloud communications platform that lets Indian businesses
> send bulk SMS, OTP, WhatsApp messages, and deploy AI agents — all on a
> single pay-as-you-go wallet with no monthly lock-in.

## Products

- [Bulk SMS](https://www.smslocal.in/products/bulk-sms/): DLT-compliant promotional and transactional SMS with smart route failover.
- [WhatsApp Business API](https://www.smslocal.in/products/whatsapp-business-api/): Green-tick verified WhatsApp messaging, templates, and team inbox.
- [OTP SMS](https://www.smslocal.in/developers/sms-api/): Priority-routed one-time passwords with sub-second delivery and retry logic.
- [RCS Business Messaging](https://www.smslocal.in/products/rcs/): Rich cards, carousels, and verified sender for Android.
- [AI Agents](https://www.smslocal.in/products/ai-agents/): No-code WhatsApp AI agents in 8 Indian languages.
- [AI Customer Service Agent](https://www.smslocal.in/ai-agents/customer-service/): Deflect support tickets across channels with grounded AI.
- [AI Booking Agent](https://www.smslocal.in/ai-agents/booking/): Automate appointment scheduling and reservation confirmations.
- [AI Lead Qualification Agent](https://www.smslocal.in/ai-agents/lead-qualification/): Score and qualify inbound leads before they reach your team.
- [AI Agent Builder](https://www.smslocal.in/ai-agents/agent-builder/): Build custom no-code AI agent flows without engineering.
- [Inbox](https://www.smslocal.in/products/inbox/): Shared team inbox for WhatsApp, SMS, and live chat.
- [Automation](https://www.smslocal.in/products/automation/): Workflow automation for messaging campaigns and drip sequences.
- [Email](https://www.smslocal.in/products/email/): Transactional and marketing email on the same wallet.
- [Voice](https://www.smslocal.in/products/voice/): AI voice receptionist and outbound voice messaging.
- [Live Chat](https://www.smslocal.in/products/live-chat/): Embeddable live chat with agent handoff.

- [E-commerce & D2C](https://www.smslocal.in/solutions/ecommerce/)
- [Banking & Fintech](https://www.smslocal.in/solutions/banking-fintech/)

- [Education](https://www.smslocal.in/solutions/education/)
- [Logistics](https://www.smslocal.in/solutions/logistics/)
- [Real Estate](https://www.smslocal.in/solutions/real-estate/)
- [Restaurant](https://www.smslocal.in/solutions/restaurant/)
- [Retail & Hospitality](https://www.smslocal.in/solutions/retail/)
- [SaaS / B2B](https://www.smslocal.in/solutions/saas-b2b/)
